Python To-Do List

Command-line task management application built with Python

Note: This is a command-line Python application. To run it, you would need Python installed on your system.

🚀 Features

  • ✅ Add new tasks
  • ✅ View all tasks with status
  • ✅ Mark tasks as completed
  • ✅ Delete tasks
  • ✅ Persistent storage (saves to file)
  • ✅ User-friendly menu interface

📋 Sample Usage

Welcome to the To-Do List Manager! 1. Add Task 2. View Tasks 3. Mark Task as Done 4. Delete Task 5. Exit Choose an option (1-5): 1 Enter task description: Complete Python project Task added successfully! Choose an option (1-5): 2 Your Tasks: 1. [ ] Complete Python project Choose an option (1-5): 3 Enter task number to mark as done: 1 Task marked as completed! Choose an option (1-5): 2 Your Tasks: 1. [✓] Complete Python project

🛠️ Technologies Used

Python File I/O Command Line Interface Data Persistence
